creator: jschachter@spendata.com
text:
Version 118.0.5993.70 (Official Build) (64-bit)

Load your favorite web page.  Open the Developer tools.  Switch to the "Performance" tab.  Click "Record" button.  CRASH!

At one point when I was experimenting with this bug, it crashed X windows as well!  I clicked "Record" and my Xfce session was immediately killed.
